issues.comment: The function `enableSqlExpressions` always returns `false` on every code path, making SQL expressions permanently disabled. Two compounding errors: (1) the feature flag check is inverted with `!h.features.IsEnabledGlobally(...)`, and (2) both the `if` branch and the fallthrough return `false`. The function should simply be `return h.features.IsEnabledGlobally(featuremgmt.FlagSqlExpressions)`. This causes all SQL expression queries to be rejected with "sqlExpressions is not implemented" even when the feature flag is enabled.
